item.description:
# ProfileSmith 1.0
- Built a new macOS provisioning profile manager from the ground up in Swift. - Indexed profiles with SQLite + GRDB for fast search, filtering, and sorting at scale. - Added archive and bundle inspection for apps, IPAs, XCArchives, and extensions. - Included Quick Look integration, drag and drop import, safe export, and filename beautification. - Added a status bar menu and Sparkle-based update support. - Covered parser, database, scanner, file operations, and UI controller behavior with automated tests.
